name: icons-components
title: Component Icons
description: Shared icon primitives used by JetBrains UI components.

files.content:
export {
  AddIcon,
  ChevronDownIcon,
  ChevronRightIcon,
  ChevronUpIcon,
  CloseIcon,
  SearchIcon,
  SettingsIcon,
  CheckIcon,
  CopyIcon,
  TrashIcon,
  EditIcon,
  RefreshIcon,
  LoaderIcon,
  FilterIcon,
} from './icons';

export type { IconProps } from './icons';

docs.description: Shared icon primitives used by core JetBrains UI components.
features: Works as an internal dependency for registry components
